basics.name: Najwa Laabid
basics.label: ML Engineer & PhD Researcher
basics.summary: ML engineer and PhD researcher with 6+ years building end-to-end solutions across drug discovery, genomics, network security, and enterprise software. Experienced across the full stack from prototyping to deployment, with a consistent record of shipping pragmatic systems in both industry (Google, Ericsson) and research settings.

work.name: Aalto University
work.summary: PhD research in machine learning applied to drug discovery, focusing on graph diffusion models for retrosynthesis.
highlights: Published at ICLR 2025 and ICML 2024 workshops

work.name: University of Eastern Finland
work.summary: Built a VAE model for a NeurIPS 2022 competition tackling multimodal single-cell integration, a core open problem in computational biology with direct implications for cancer disease profiling.

work.name: Aalto University
work.summary: Implemented approximate inference for nonstationary Gaussian processes via Kalman smoothing in JAX, enabling GP models to adapt to signals with time-varying dynamics such as gravitational wave chirps.

work.name: Ericsson Inc.
work.summary: Studied IoT botnet C&C communication across 14 malware families; built a Random Forest detection system across three traffic types, achieving near-perfect F1 on decentralized botnets and 0.85 F1 on real centralized captures.

work.name: Google Inc.
work.summary: Built metadata parsing logic for Google's internal AV-preset automation, reducing manual meeting room setup for one of the world's largest internal conferencing tools.

work.name: CLE at Al Akhawayn University
work.summary: Built a web platform replacing a manual booking system, handling session bookings and hour logging across 79+ courses and 2050 students; later led the redesign.

work.name: Sankhya Jiva Tecnologia e Inovação LTDA
work.summary: Replaced Dialogflow with a custom open-source temporal expression parser for Brazilian Portuguese in enterprise chatbot BIA to improve language accuracy and eliminate vendor lock-in; adopted and extended by the team post-internship.

work.name: ASC Brazil
work.summary: Developed a social media management module for an ERP platform, enabling clients to read and post across YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter directly from within the system.

education.area: Machine learning applied to drug discovery
Information Technology (focus on data science, minor in statistics)

publications.name: Equivariant Denoisers Cannot Copy Graphs: Align Your Graph Diffusion Models
publications.summary: We demonstrate that standard permutation equivariant denoisers face fundamental limitations in graph-to-graph translation tasks and propose aligning input and target graphs to break input symmetries while preserving permutation equivariance.

publications.name: Conditional Flow Matching for Time Series Modelling
publications.publisher: ICML 2024 Workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling

publications.name: Aligned Diffusion Models for Retrosynthesis
publications.publisher: ICML 2024 Workshop on Geometry-grounded Representation Learning and Generative Modeling

projects.name: RxnLab: Open platform for retrosynthetic analysis
projects.summary: Open platform bridging ML research and chemistry practice, hosting retrosynthetic models on CSC's Rahti infrastructure.

projects.name: Denoising scRNA-seq data using Bayesian Inference
projects.summary: Imputed dropout events in scRNA-seq data by fitting a Zero-Inflated Negative Binomial noise model via deep autoencoders.

projects.name: Adversarial Resistance in Toxic Comments Detection
projects.summary: Showed that small-scale adversarial training improves robustness of toxic comment classifiers without degrading accuracy on clean data.

projects.name: Staffing Plan App for Jacobs Engineering (JESA) Group Inc.
projects.summary: Web-app managing resource allocation and project development for JESA Morocco.
